name: Health Sync
description: Receives Apple HealthKit data from the oc-health-sync iOS app, stores it locally in SQLite, and provides agent tools for health data analysis.

apiKey.description: API key for authenticating ingest requests from the iOS app. If omitted, one is auto-generated on first run.

storagePath.description: Path to the SQLite database file.

summaryCacheTtlMinutes.description: How long to cache daily summaries before regenerating. 0 = always regenerate.
